reviews.title: Best Earbuds I have Ever Owned!
reviews.text: I’m honestly impressed with these wireless earbuds. Not only is the sound quality clear with strong bass, but the durability is unbelievable. I accidentally washed them multiple times with water, and they still work perfectly! The battery life is solid, the fit is comfortable, and the Bluetooth connection is smooth with no dropouts. Definitely one of the best purchases I have made, worth every penny. Highly recommended for anyone looking for reliable and tough earbuds!

reviews.title: Slippery Earbuds
reviews.text: The product itself works. The quality is okay. However, the overall shape works against it: it starts to slip often, especially when one sweats or walks around in the city for an extended period of time; the constant movement and adjustment required also prevents a clear and consistent sound quality; and, when outside, especially when there are a lot of people around, I have to increase the level of sound, otherwise the songs become inaudible. The price might be tempting, but for a few dollars extra, it is possible to get a product that can muffle external sounds and hold better in the ear.

reviews.text: These ear buds are mid level, but the sound is ok. It has a few sound profiles that can be changed through taps on the earbuds. Got them on sale and they were worth what I paid. The touch response accidentally mutes my calls sometimes. Battery life is alright. I may get 6+/- hours of continuous use from them. But the case extends the battery life.
reviews.author: HappyDad1

reviews.title: Excellent lil set of beans :3
reviews.text:
Used almost daily for 1.5 years, including while working in an automotive shop, and a truck lube shop. The case, as well as both earbuds, have been dropped numerous times, from heights up to 15 feet, even on a high speed longboard, and have survived beautifully. These earbuds have been dropped in (shallow) engine oil, I've worn them in the shower several times. They've handled sweat, probably blood, and I beat the hell out of them.

Each earbud's housing is very easy to open, using no adhesive and only clips. This makes for really good access to the battery for replacement. But I don't foresee needing a battery replacement for a good while, as these earbuds last weeks before i have to recharge the case. They connect fairly quickly and have slightly annoying but decently intuitive capacitive controls, that also still work flawlessly after my time with them.

While my review is mostly about durability, these even sound good too! Awesome purchase, highly recommended.




written after eightteen months of ownership.
i paid $42 for these in mid 2022.

reviews.title: Whole package, best deal you can get
reviews.text: The best in low pricing bracket or even higher!! Super long battery life, super long wireless/bluetooth range, small and smooth case. Just all in one pack. If I have to say one or two things not so great is that its “touch buttons” are very sensitive when it gets wet if you wear a hat with string when yu sweat or you have long hairs with wet dripping down doing outdoors activities. Also the buttons are hard to “touch”. Sometimes it’s annoying that you “touch” but it doesn’t “catches”. You’d miss “pressing buttons “ more at that moments. But once you get a hand on it, or just don’t get it wet, it will still keep you going almost half a day (playtime estimate: 8hrs?) before you putting it back to the case to recharge it. I use single earbud at a time so I can just rotate between charging and this lasts me listening to music/podcast all day long and I only need to recharge the case once a few days or so

reviews.title: Definitely worth the price
reviews.text:
For earbuds this cheap you’d expect bad quality, but Soundcore made budget and quality such a great and balanced duo. The sound quality of course isn’t going to reach the same sound quality as that of $300 earbuds, but it’s still very good. The bass is great and so is the overall sound. My only gripe is when the gets louder, it has a definite high pitch sound on “s” sounds. Still very good earbuds at a very good price.
Also, I’ve dropped it a couple times on very hard surfaces and I can safely say the case is sturdy but it can open when you drop it.

reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.text: Got these on sale for $25 and liked them enough to buy a second pair. They won't compete with my Samsung Buds2 Pro at this price point, but they work very well for Zoom calls (although background noise comes through more than with my headset with a boom mic), casual audio, and any scenario where I prefer not to risk using my high end earbuds or headphones in case they get lost or damaged. The audio is clear, and the fit is comfortable. The wireless connection has been very stable. Highly recommend these if you are looking for a solid, budget-friendly paire of true wireless buds.
